meaning: n.(1800年前)康沃尔人说的凯尔特语,考尼什(雏)鸡adj.(英国)康沃尔郡的,康沃尔人的
examples: She is expecting up to 20 people at the first meeting she has called, at her local pub in the Cornish village of Polperro.
Once, he showed me a program for the Cornish Fair.
You don't need a license to own a boat, " added Cornish.
The unusual looking fish is rarely spotted in Cornish waters, preferring the colder temperatures of Greenland.
Bristol have made two changes to the starting XV that beat Cornish Pirates at the weekend.
